visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a bright Costco warehouse aisle, two women stand in front of the camera; the one on the right wears a black beret and brown off-shoulder top, speaking energetically while large text graphics about a lifetime nail clipper appear as overlays against the background of high-stacked shelves. (2) They move to a red display shelf filled with Zwilling product boxes. Both women gesture with their hands toward the products, their facial expressions are joyful and animated, highlighting the specific 4-piece set mentioned in the colorful variety-style text. (3) The scene cuts to a high-contrast indoor setting where a white foot rasp, a metal nail file, and a clipper are shown in sharp detail. A hand is seen using the foot rasp on a heel, removing dry skin, while informative text highlights the results. (4) One woman appears in a modern kitchen with a pink wall, showing off a set of professional knives on a wooden block. This is followed by a demonstration of the nail clipper's 360-degree rotating head and its magnetic three-times magnifier attachment in a well-lit living room setting. (5) The final phase returns to the warehouse setting. The two women are now pushing a silver shopping cart loaded with several Zwilling sets. They wave at the camera with broad smiles as the video ends with a celebratory text overlay and bright store lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 一輩子只買一個指甲剪. [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 一刀傳三代. [Slogan]: 你會選甚麼? (2) [Variety]: 跟我來! (3) [Slogan]: 耐用、精準是他的優點. [Slogan]: 優惠、折扣是這次的重點. (4) [Subtitle]: 德國雙人美甲手足護理4件組. [Slogan]: 價格只要699元. [Slogan]: 超級划算! (5) [Variety]: 足部挫刀! (6) [Variety]: 超細嫩少女足. (7) [Subtitle]: 德國雙人的刀具. (8) [Variety]: 精準工藝. (9) [Slogan]: 可以360度旋轉. (10) [Slogan]: 也可以240度上下靈活調整. (11) [Variety]: 彎腰困難. (12) [Variety]: 銳利精準. (13) [Variety]: 藍寶石指甲挫刀. (14) [Variety]: 最乾淨漂亮的模樣. (15) [Slogan]: 送禮自用兩相宜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video promoting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a pink off-shoulder top. The other woman wears a dark beret, a brown off-shoulder blouse, and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video transitions between a Costco warehouse with tall industrial shelving, a domestic kitchen with pink walls and a wooden knife block, and a bathroom with a white tub.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched female narration begins with rapid delivery and high energy, accompanied by a bright, upbeat electronic pop background track with a tempo around 125 BPM. Digital pop sound effects trigger with the appearance of the first large text overlays on screen. (2) As the scene transitions to the warehouse aisle, a whoosh SFX marks the cut. The narrator's voice maintains a professional yet excited commercial tone, with clear articulation and high emotional arousal, explaining the unique features of the grooming set. (3) During the close-up demonstration of the foot rasp, a distinct rhythmic scraping sound is mixed in to emphasize the physical effectiveness of the tool. The BGM remains consistent in the background, providing a steady energetic pulse throughout the product breakdown. (4) In the final segment, the audio event density increases with multiple quick cuts and dings as price points and promotional offers are announced. The track concludes with a final volume swell and a shopping cart rattle sound as they head to checkout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Showcase -> User Testimonial -> Practical Demo -> Pricing -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Zwilling German Nail Care 4-piece set available at Costco by highlighting its durability, specialized features like the 360-degree clipper and magnifier, and its attractive price point.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, price mentions, and Costco warehouse setting with brand logos prominently shown.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic social media style commercial utilizing warehouse location shots and domestic demonstrations to build trust and urgency.
